description_long: This object is a compact, submachine gun-style firearm with a boxy, rectangular receiver and a prominent magazine extending downward from the grip. The exterior is predominantly matte black with a slightly textured finish, and the body features minimal ornamentation aside from some subtle panel lines and mechanical details. The barrel is short and stubby, protruding only slightly from the front of the receiver, and the rear is fitted with a wire-style folding stock that curves outward. The top of the receiver includes a simple iron sight, and the trigger guard is rounded and closely fitted to the grip. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on compactness and ease of handling, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style firearm with a boxy receiver, short barrel, and wire folding stock. Its utilitarian design features a prominent magazine and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the short barrel, iron sight, and the narrow profile of the receiver with the magazine directly below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the boxy receiver, wire folding stock, and the magazine extending from the grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wire stock and the back of the receiver, with the grip and magazine visible below.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the receiver, folding stock, and magazine, with some mechanical details visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and stubby with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, compact, closely fitted to the grip with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
